name: Applesauce Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar, shortening, and egg.
2. Add applesauce in which baking soda has been dissolved.
3. Sift flour, spices, and salt into the mixture.
4. Add raisins and nuts.
5. Drop dough several inches apart onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 300°F for about 15 minutes.
